case_title: CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JORGE MOTA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MOTA, JORGE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-26-2012

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MOTA, JORGE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-11-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-11-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $445.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MOTA, JORGE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTA, JORGE $22,394.51 PRINCIPAL, $445.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,839.51, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-12-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
